Analysis: I now have 4 models trained. The 3-model ensemble gave 440.03. Adding model4 should further reduce variance. I need to update predict.py to include model4 in the ensemble, then submit eval immediately. I have very little time left (~40 min), so I should submit eval right away.

Decision: Update predict.py to load model4 as well, then submit eval with 4-model ensemble.
